Metadata.title: LAV PHARMA | Pharmaceutical & Veterinary Registration in Latin America
Metadata.description: Sanitary registration, regulatory compliance, and dossier management for pharmaceutical and veterinary products across 10 Latin American markets. 540+ registrations, 96% first-pass approval. Your fastest path to LATAM.

Hero.label: Regulatory Affairs · Pharma & Veterinary
Hero.title: Your fastest path to Latin American markets.
Hero.subtitle: We handle sanitary registrations, dossier compilation, and ongoing regulatory compliance across 10 LATAM jurisdictions — so your products launch on schedule.

journey.note1: Gap analysis vs. target country requirements

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive regulatory solutions for pharmaceutical and veterinary products

genericos.title: Generic Medications
genericos.description: Health registration of generic medications with the regulatory authorities of each country.

marca.title: Brand Products
marca.description: Registration of brand-name pharmaceutical products, including innovator drugs and branded generics.

vacunas.title: Vaccines
vacunas.description: Regulatory management for the registration of human and veterinary vaccines in Latin American markets.

biotecnologicos.title: Biotechnological
biotecnologicos.description: Registration of biotechnological products and biosimilars with specialized technical support.

bioequivalentes.title: Bioequivalent
bioequivalentes.description: Registration of bioequivalent medications, including management of bioequivalence studies.

holding.title: Regulatory Holding
holding.description: Legal representation and designated technical responsible for health registrations before each country's authorities.

almacenamiento.title: Warehousing
almacenamiento.description: Coordinated through local partners based on each product's needs. Veterinary products stored in-house; pharmaceutical warehousing in development.

permisos.title: Import Permits
permisos.description: Processing of import permits and licenses for pharmaceutical and veterinary products.

distribucion.title: Distribution
distribucion.description: Licensed transportation and distribution of veterinary and pharmaceutical products across markets.

asesoria.title: Regulatory Consulting
asesoria.description: Your strategic ally for regulatory product development, guiding market expansion across Latin America.

cumplimiento.title: Regulatory Compliance
cumplimiento.description: We provide an up-to-date list of requirements aligned with the latest regulatory laws in each market.

International.title: International Reach
International.subtitle: We connect global manufacturers with the Latin American market through our regulatory expertise.

origin.subtitle: We register products from manufacturers in these countries, managing all necessary technical and regulatory documentation.

registration.title: Specialized in Registration across Latin America
registration.subtitle: We are your strategic partner for registering pharmaceutical and veterinary products in these markets.

About.heading: 10 years navigating LATAM regulation.
About.lead: For foreign companies entering Latin America, backed by staff with extensive industry experience, registering under manufacturer, holding, or product holder modalities and contract-manufactured products.

mission.title: Mission
mission.headline: To unlock LATAM markets — accurately, on schedule, on the first filing.
mission.text: We provide specialized services in the management, registration, and obtaining of permits for the distribution of medications, veterinary products, cosmetics, food, medical supplies, and health products — ensuring compliance with current regulations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.headline: To be a strategic ally for regulatory and commercial purposes.
vision.text: For companies in the health, veterinary, cosmetic, medical supplies, hygiene, and food sectors — both national and international.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We act with honesty, transparency, and ethics in every process.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We rigorously comply with health and legal regulations.

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.description: We optimize processes to deliver agile and timely solutions.

quality.title: Quality Commitment
quality.description: We pursue excellence in every service, ensuring precision.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: We protect our clients' information with total discretion.

clientFocus.title: Prompt Response
clientFocus.description: We respond quickly so your processes never stall.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously improve to adapt to the regulatory environment.

Contact.title: Ready to begin a market entry?
Contact.subtitle: Tell us about your product and target markets. A senior regulatory lead will respond within one business day with a scoped engagement plan.
